controls.control_objective: To ensure be called the reserve bank of india (digital payment security controls) directions, 2021
controls.control_description:
These directions shall be called the Reserve Bank of India (Digital Payment
Security Controls) directions, 2021.
controls.implementation_method: Implement operational procedure to be called the reserve bank of india (digital payment security controls) directions, 2021

controls.control_objective: To ensure come into effect six months from the day they are placed on the official website of the reserve bank of india (rbi)
controls.control_description:
These directions shall come into effect six months from the day they are placed
on the official website of the Reserve Bank of India (RBI).
controls.implementation_method: Implement operational procedure to come into effect six months from the day they are placed on the official website of the reserve bank of india (rbi)

controls.control_objective: To ensure apply to the following regulated entities (res): a) scheduled commercial banks (excluding regional rural banks)
controls.implementation_method: Implement operational procedure to apply to the following regulated entities (res): a) scheduled commercial banks (excluding regional rural banks)

controls.control_objective: To ensure have the same meaning as have been assigned to them under the banking regulation act, 1949, reserve bank of india act, 1934, payment and settlement sy
controls.control_description:
Definitions
All expressions unless defined herein shall have the same meaning as have been
assigned to them under the Banking Regulation Act, 1949, Reserve Bank of India Act,
1934, Payment and Settlement Systems Act, 2007 or Information Technology Act,
2000/ Information Technology (Amendment) Act, 2008 and Rules made thereunder,
any statutory modification or re-enactment thereto or as used in commercial parlance,
as the case may be.
controls.implementation_method: Implement operational procedure to have the same meaning as have been assigned to them under the banking regulation act, 1949, reserve bank of india act, 1934, payment and settlement sy

controls.control_objective: To ensure formulate a policy for digital payment products and services with the approval of their board
controls.control_description:
REs shall formulate a policy for digital payment products and services with the
approval of their Board.
controls.implementation_method: Establish and maintain policy to formulate a policy for digital payment products and services with the approval of their board

controls.control_objective: To ensure explicitly discuss about payment security requirements from functionality, security and performance (fsp) angles such as: a) necessary controls to pro
controls.control_description:
The contours of the policy, while discussing the parameters
of any "new product" including its alignment with the overall business strategy and
inherent risk of the product, risk management/ mitigation measures, compliance
with regulatory instructions, customer experience, etc., should explicitly discuss
about payment security requirements from Functionality, Security and Performance
(FSP) angles such as:
a) Necessary controls to protect the confidentiality of customer data and integrity
of data and processes associated with the digital product/ services offered;
controls.implementation_method: Implement operational procedure to explicitly discuss about payment security requirements from functionality, security and performance (fsp) angles such as: a) necessary controls to pro

controls.control_objective: To ensure be responsible for implementation of this policy
controls.control_description:
The Board and Senior Management shall be responsible for implementation of this
policy.
controls.implementation_method: Establish and maintain policy to be responsible for implementation of this policy

controls.control_objective: To ensure be reviewed periodically, at least on a yearly basis
controls.control_description: The policy shall be reviewed periodically, at least on a yearly basis.
controls.implementation_method: Implement operational procedure to be reviewed periodically, at least on a yearly basis

controls.control_objective: To ensure formulate this policy separately for its different digital products or include the same as part of their overall product policy
controls.control_description:
REs may
formulate this policy separately for its different digital products or include the same
as part of their overall product policy.
controls.implementation_method: Establish and maintain policy to formulate this policy separately for its different digital products or include the same as part of their overall product policy

controls.control_objective: To ensure require that every digital payment product/ services offered addresses the mechanics, clear definition of starting point, critical intermittent stages
controls.control_description:
Further, the policy document should require
that every digital payment product/ services offered addresses the mechanics, clear
definition of starting point, critical intermittent stages/ points and end point in the
digital payment cycle, security aspects, validations till the digital payment is settled,
clear pictorial representation of digital path and exception handling.
controls.implementation_method: Implement operational procedure to require that every digital payment product/ services offered addresses the mechanics, clear definition of starting point, critical intermittent stages

controls.control_objective: To ensure also be taken in to account
controls.control_description:
In addition,
signing off of the above requirements, mechanism for carrying out User Acceptance
Tests (UAT) in multiple stages before roll out, sign off from multiple stakeholders
(post UAT) and data archival requirements shall also be taken in to account.
controls.implementation_method: Implement operational procedure to also be taken in to account

controls.control_objective: To ensure be clearly articulated
controls.control_description:
The
need for an external assessment of the entire process including the logic, build and
security aspects of the application(s) supporting the digital product should be clearly
articulated.
controls.implementation_method: Implement operational procedure to be clearly articulated

controls.control_objective: To ensure incorporate appropriate processes into their governance and risk management programs for identifying, analysing, monitoring and managing the specific
controls.control_description:
REs shall incorporate appropriate processes into their governance and risk
management programs for identifying, analysing, monitoring and managing the
specific risks, including compliance risk and fraud risk, associated with the portfolio
of digital payment products and services on a continual basis and in a holistic
manner.
controls.implementation_method: Implement operational procedure to incorporate appropriate processes into their governance and risk management programs for identifying, analysing, monitoring and managing the specific

controls.control_objective: To ensure have appropriate performance monitoring systems/ key performance indicators for assessing whether the product or service offered through digital payme
controls.control_description:
The Board/ Senior Management of REs shall have appropriate
performance monitoring systems/ key performance indicators for assessing
whether the product or service offered through digital payment channels meet
operational and security norms.
controls.implementation_method: Implement operational procedure to have appropriate performance monitoring systems/ key performance indicators for assessing whether the product or service offered through digital payme

controls.control_objective: To ensure define product-level limits on the level of acceptable security risk, document specific security objectives and performance criteria including quantitative benchmarks for evaluating the success of the security built into the digital payment product or service, periodically compare actual results with projections and qualitative benchmarks to detect and address adverse trends or concerns in a timely manner and modify the business plan/ strategy involving the product
controls.control_description:
As part of this process, the REs shall define product-level limits on the level of
acceptable security risk, document specific security objectives and performance
criteria including quantitative benchmarks for evaluating the success of the security
built into the digital payment product or service, periodically compare actual results
with projections and qualitative benchmarks to detect and address adverse trends
or concerns in a timely manner and modify the business plan/ strategy involving the
product, when appropriate, based on the security performance of the product or
service.
controls.implementation_method: Establish and maintain policy to define product-level limits on the level of acceptable security risk, document specific security objectives and performance criteria including quantitative benchmarks for evaluating the success of the security built into the digital payment product or service, periodically compare actual results with projections and qualitative benchmarks to detect and address adverse trends or concerns in a timely manner and modify the business plan/ strategy involving the product

controls.control_objective: To ensure have trained resources with necessary expertise to manage the digital payment infrastructure
controls.control_description:
REs shall have trained resources with necessary expertise to manage the digital
payment infrastructure.
controls.implementation_method: Implement operational procedure to have trained resources with necessary expertise to manage the digital payment infrastructure

controls.control_objective: To ensure be put in place
controls.control_description:
Wherever the REs are dependent on third party service
providers, adequate oversight and controls for monitoring the activities of the third
party personnel, in line with RBI guidelines on outsourcing, shall be put in place.
controls.implementation_method: Implement operational procedure to be put in place

controls.control_objective: To ensure conduct risk assessments with regard to the safety and security of digital payment products and associated processes and services as well as suitabili
controls.control_description:
REs shall conduct risk assessments with regard to the safety and security of digital
payment products and associated processes and services as well as suitability and
appropriateness of the same vis-a-vis the target users, both prior to establishing the
service(s) and regularly thereafter.
controls.implementation_method: Implement operational procedure to conduct risk assessments with regard to the safety and security of digital payment products and associated processes and services as well as suitabili

controls.control_objective: To ensure take into account - a) the technology stack and solutions used
controls.control_description:
The risk assessment should take into account -
a) The technology stack and solutions used;
controls.implementation_method: Implement operational procedure to take into account - a) the technology stack and solutions used

controls.control_objective: To ensure cover the surrounding ecosystem as well
controls.control_description: Such assessment shall cover the surrounding ecosystem as well.
controls.implementation_method: Implement operational procedure to cover the surrounding ecosystem as well

controls.control_objective: To ensure address the need to protect and secure payment data1 and evaluate the resilience of systems
controls.control_description:
The assessment
of risks shall address the need to protect and secure payment data1 and evaluate
the resilience of systems.
controls.implementation_method: Implement operational procedure to address the need to protect and secure payment data1 and evaluate the resilience of systems

controls.control_objective: To ensure cover the risks (inherent) & controls vis-à-vis the probability and impact of threats to arrive at residual risk
controls.control_description:
The internal Risk and Control Self-Assessment (RCSA)
exercise shall cover the risks (inherent) & controls vis-à-vis the probability and
impact of threats to arrive at residual risk.
controls.implementation_method: Implement operational procedure to cover the risks (inherent) & controls vis-à-vis the probability and impact of threats to arrive at residual risk

controls.control_objective: To ensure evaluate the risks associated with the chosen technology platforms, application architecture, both on the server and client side
controls.control_description:
REs shall evaluate the risks associated with the chosen technology platforms,
application architecture, both on the server and client side.
controls.implementation_method: Implement operational procedure to evaluate the risks associated with the chosen technology platforms, application architecture, both on the server and client side

controls.control_objective: To ensure undertake a review of the risk scenarios and existing security measures based on incidents affecting their services, before any major change to the infrastructure or procedures is made or
controls.control_description:
Further, REs should
undertake a review of the risk scenarios and existing security measures based on
incidents affecting their services, before any major change to the infrastructure or
procedures is made or, when, any new threats are identified through risk monitoring
activities.
controls.implementation_method: Implement operational procedure to undertake a review of the risk scenarios and existing security measures based on incidents affecting their services, before any major change to the infrastructure or procedures is made or

controls.control_objective: To ensure be closely controlled to minimise risk
controls.control_description:
Further, unused or unwanted features of the platform should be closely
controlled to minimise risk.
controls.implementation_method: Implement operational procedure to be closely controlled to minimise risk

controls.control_objective: To ensure develop sound internal control systems and take into account the operational risk before offering digital payment products and related services
controls.control_description:
REs shall develop sound internal control systems and take into account the
operational risk before offering digital payment products and related services.
controls.implementation_method: Implement operational procedure to develop sound internal control systems and take into account the operational risk before offering digital payment products and related services

controls.control_objective: To ensure ensure that the digital payment architecture is robust and scalable, commensurate with the transaction volumes and customer growth
controls.control_description:
REs shall ensure that the digital payment architecture is robust and scalable,
commensurate with the transaction volumes and customer growth.
controls.implementation_method: Implement operational procedure to ensure that the digital payment architecture is robust and scalable, commensurate with the transaction volumes and customer growth

controls.control_objective: To ensure ensure that a robust capacity management plan is in place to meet evolving demand
controls.control_description:
The IT strategy
of the RE shall ensure that a robust capacity management plan is in place to meet
evolving demand.
controls.implementation_method: Implement operational procedure to ensure that a robust capacity management plan is in place to meet evolving demand

controls.control_objective: To ensure also put in place review mechanism of it/ it security architecture and technology platform overhaul on a periodic basis based on board- approved polic
controls.control_description:
REs shall also put in place review mechanism of IT/ IT Security
architecture and technology platform overhaul on a periodic basis based on Board-
approved policy.
controls.implementation_method: Implement operational procedure to also put in place review mechanism of it/ it security architecture and technology platform overhaul on a periodic basis based on board- approved polic

controls.control_objective: To ensure have necessary capacity, systems and procedures in place to periodically test the backed-up data, application pertaining to digital products to ensure
controls.implementation_method: Implement operational procedure to have necessary capacity, systems and procedures in place to periodically test the backed-up data, application pertaining to digital products to ensure

controls.control_objective: To ensure be tested at least on a half-yearly basis for digital payment products and services
controls.control_description:
These facilities should be tested at least
on a half-yearly basis for digital payment products and services.
controls.implementation_method: Implement operational procedure to be tested at least on a half-yearly basis for digital payment products and services

controls.control_objective: To ensure adhere to a secure standard
controls.control_description:
The communication protocol in the digital payment channels (especially over
Internet) shall adhere to a secure standard.
controls.implementation_method: Implement operational procedure to adhere to a secure standard

controls.control_objective: To ensure be implemented in the digital payment ecosystem
controls.control_description:
An appropriate level of encryption and
security shall be implemented in the digital payment ecosystem.
controls.implementation_method: Implement operational procedure to be implemented in the digital payment ecosystem

controls.control_objective: To ensure store sensitive information in html hidden fields, cookies, or any other client-side storage to avoid any compromise in the integrity of the data
controls.control_description:
Web applications providing the digital payment products and services should not
store sensitive information in HTML hidden fields, cookies, or any other client-side
storage to avoid any compromise in the integrity of the data.
controls.implementation_method: Implement operational procedure to store sensitive information in html hidden fields, cookies, or any other client-side storage to avoid any compromise in the integrity of the data

controls.control_objective: To ensure implement web application firewall (waf) solution and ddos mitigation techniques to secure the digital payment products and services offered over inte
controls.control_description:
REs shall implement Web Application Firewall (WAF) solution and DDoS mitigation
techniques to secure the digital payment products and services offered over
Internet.
controls.implementation_method: Implement technical controls to configure system to implement web application firewall (waf) solution and ddos mitigation techniques to secure the digital payment products and services offered over inte

controls.control_objective: To ensure be strong, adopting internationally accepted and published standards that are not deprecated/ demonstrated to be insecure/ vulnerable and the configur
controls.control_description:
The key length (for symmetric/ asymmetric encryption, hashing), algorithms (for
encryption, signing, exchange of keys, creation of message digest, random number
generators), cipher suites, digital certificates and applicable protocols used in
transmission channels, processing of data, authentication purpose, shall be strong,
adopting internationally accepted and published standards that are not deprecated/
demonstrated to be insecure/ vulnerable and the configurations involved in
implementing such controls are in general, compliant with extant instructions and
the law of the land.
controls.implementation_method: Implement operational procedure to be strong, adopting internationally accepted and published standards that are not deprecated/ demonstrated to be insecure/ vulnerable and the configur

controls.control_objective: To ensure renew their digital certificates used in digital payment ecosystem well in time
controls.control_description:
REs shall renew their digital certificates used in digital payment ecosystem well in
time.
controls.implementation_method: Implement operational procedure to renew their digital certificates used in digital payment ecosystem well in time

controls.control_objective: To ensure have effective logging and monitoring capabilities to track user activity, security changes and identify anomalous behaviour and transactions
controls.control_description:
The mobile application2 and internet banking application should have effective
logging and monitoring capabilities to track user activity, security changes and
identify anomalous behaviour and transactions.
controls.implementation_method: Implement operational procedure to have effective logging and monitoring capabilities to track user activity, security changes and identify anomalous behaviour and transactions

controls.control_objective: To ensure implement multi-tier application architecture, segregating application, database and presentation layer in the digital payment products and services
controls.control_description:
REs shall implement multi-tier application architecture, segregating application,
database and presentation layer in the digital payment products and services.
controls.implementation_method: Implement operational procedure to implement multi-tier application architecture, segregating application, database and presentation layer in the digital payment products and services

controls.control_objective: To ensure follow a 'secure by design' approach in the development of digital payment products and services
controls.control_description:
REs shall follow a 'secure by design' approach in the development of digital
payment products and services.
controls.implementation_method: Implement operational procedure to follow a 'secure by design' approach in the development of digital payment products and services

controls.control_objective: To ensure ensure that digital payment applications are inherently more secure by embedding security within their development lifecycle
controls.control_description:
REs shall ensure that digital payment applications
are inherently more secure by embedding security within their development
lifecycle.
controls.implementation_method: Implement operational procedure to ensure that digital payment applications are inherently more secure by embedding security within their development lifecycle

controls.control_objective: To ensure explicitly define security objectives (including protection of customer information/ data) during (a) requirements gathering, (b) designing, (c) devel
controls.control_description:
REs shall explicitly define security objectives (including protection of customer
information/ data) during (a) requirements gathering, (b) designing, (c)
development, (d) testing including source code review, (e) implementation,
maintenance & monitoring and (f) decommissioning phases of the digital payment
applications.
controls.implementation_method: Implement operational procedure to explicitly define security objectives (including protection of customer information/ data) during (a) requirements gathering, (b) designing, (c) devel

controls.control_objective: To ensure adopt and incorporate a threat modelling approach during application lifecycle management into their policies, processes, guidelines and procedures
controls.control_description:
REs (including those partnering with other entities to co-brand/ co-develop
applications) shall adopt and incorporate a threat modelling approach during
application lifecycle management into their policies, processes, guidelines and
procedures.
controls.implementation_method: Establish and maintain policy to adopt and incorporate a threat modelling approach during application lifecycle management into their policies, processes, guidelines and procedures

controls.control_objective: To ensure have an escrow arrangement for the source code for ensuring continuity of services in case the vendor defaults or is unable to provide services
controls.control_description:
For digital payment applications that are licensed by a third party vendor, REs shall
have an escrow arrangement for the source code for ensuring continuity of services
in case the vendor defaults or is unable to provide services.
controls.implementation_method: Implement operational procedure to have an escrow arrangement for the source code for ensuring continuity of services in case the vendor defaults or is unable to provide services

controls.control_objective: To ensure conduct security testing including review of source code, vulnerability assessment (va) and penetration testing (pt) of their digital payment applicat
controls.control_description:
REs shall conduct security testing including review of source code, Vulnerability
Assessment (VA) and Penetration Testing (PT) of their digital payment applications
to assure that the application is secure for putting through transactions while
preserving confidentiality and integrity of the data that is stored and transmitted.
controls.implementation_method: Implement operational procedure to conduct security testing including review of source code, vulnerability assessment (va) and penetration testing (pt) of their digital payment applicat

controls.control_objective: To ensure invariably cover compliance with various standards like owasp
controls.control_description:
Such testing should invariably cover compliance with various standards like
OWASP.
controls.implementation_method: Implement operational procedure to invariably cover compliance with various standards like owasp

controls.control_objective: To ensure obtain a certificate from the application developer stating that the application is free of known vulnerabilities, malwares and any covert channels in
controls.control_description:
If the source code is not owned by the RE, then, in such cases, the RE
shall obtain a certificate from the application developer stating that the application
is free of known vulnerabilities, malwares and any covert channels in the code.
controls.implementation_method: Implement operational procedure to obtain a certificate from the application developer stating that the application is free of known vulnerabilities, malwares and any covert channels in

controls.control_objective: To ensure be conducted at least on a half-yearly basis
controls.implementation_method: Implement operational procedure to be conducted at least on a half-yearly basis

controls.control_objective: To ensure be conducted at least on a yearly basis
controls.control_description:
PT shall be
conducted at least on a yearly basis.
controls.implementation_method: Implement operational procedure to be conducted at least on a yearly basis

controls.control_objective: To ensure be conducted as and when any new it infrastructure or digital payment application is introduced or when any major change is performed in application o
controls.control_description: In addition, VA/PT shall be conducted as and when any new IT Infrastructure or digital payment application is introduced or when any major change is performed in application or infrastructure;
controls.implementation_method: Implement operational procedure to be conducted as and when any new it infrastructure or digital payment application is introduced or when any major change is performed in application o

controls.control_objective: To ensure be conducted/ obtained
controls.control_description:
b) Testing related to review of source code/ certification shall be conducted/
obtained.
controls.implementation_method: Implement operational procedure to be conducted/ obtained

controls.control_objective: To ensure continue on a yearly basis
controls.control_description: This shall continue on a yearly basis, if changes/ upgrades have been made to the application during the year;
controls.implementation_method: Implement operational procedure to continue on a yearly basis

controls.control_objective: To ensure broadly address the objective that the product/ version/module(s) functions only in a manner that it is intended to do, is developed as per the best s
controls.control_description:
c) Testing/ Certification should broadly address the objective that the product/
version/module(s) functions only in a manner that it is intended to do, is developed as per the best secure design/ coding practices and standards, addressing known flaws/threats due to insecure coding;
controls.implementation_method: Implement operational procedure to broadly address the objective that the product/ version/module(s) functions only in a manner that it is intended to do, is developed as per the best s

controls.control_objective: To ensure be included by the re into third-party contractual arrangements for any non-compliance by the application provider
controls.control_description:
and d) Penal provisions shall be included by the RE into third-party contractual
arrangements for any non-compliance by the application provider.
controls.implementation_method: Implement operational procedure to be included by the re into third-party contractual arrangements for any non-compliance by the application provider

controls.control_objective: To ensure also run automated va scanning tools to automatically scan all systems on the network that are critical, public facing or store customer sensitive dat
controls.control_description:
REs may also run automated VA scanning tools to automatically scan all systems
on the network that are critical, public facing or store customer sensitive data on a
continuous/ more frequent basis.
controls.implementation_method: Implement operational procedure to also run automated va scanning tools to automatically scan all systems on the network that are critical, public facing or store customer sensitive dat

controls.control_objective: To ensure compare the results from earlier vulnerability scans to verify/ ascertain that vulnerabilities are addressed either by patching, implementing a compen
controls.control_description:
REs shall compare the results from earlier vulnerability scans to verify/ ascertain
that vulnerabilities are addressed either by patching, implementing a compensating
control, or documenting and accepting the residual risk with necessary approval
and that there is no recurrence of the known vulnerabilities.
controls.implementation_method: Implement operational procedure to compare the results from earlier vulnerability scans to verify/ ascertain that vulnerabilities are addressed either by patching, implementing a compen

controls.control_objective: To ensure be fixed in a time-bound manner
controls.control_description:
The identified
vulnerabilities should be fixed in a time-bound manner.
controls.implementation_method: Implement operational procedure to be fixed in a time-bound manner

controls.control_objective: To ensure ensure that all vulnerability scanning is performed in authenticated mode either with agents running locally on the system to analyse the security con
controls.control_description:
REs shall ensure that all vulnerability scanning is performed in authenticated mode
either with agents running locally on the system to analyse the security configuration
or with remote scanners that are given administrative rights on the system being
tested.3
controls.implementation_method: Implement operational procedure to ensure that all vulnerability scanning is performed in authenticated mode either with agents running locally on the system to analyse the security con

controls.control_objective: To ensure verify and thoroughly test the functionality (to validate whether the system meets the functional requirements/ specifications) and security controls
controls.control_description:
REs shall verify and thoroughly test the functionality (to validate whether the system
meets the functional requirements/ specifications) and security controls of payment
products and services before its launch/ moving to the production environment.
controls.implementation_method: Implement operational procedure to verify and thoroughly test the functionality (to validate whether the system meets the functional requirements/ specifications) and security controls

controls.control_objective: To ensure institute a mechanism to actively monitor for the non-genuine/ unauthorised/ malicious applications (with similar name/ features) on popular app- stor
controls.control_description:
REs shall institute a mechanism to actively monitor for the non-genuine/
unauthorised/ malicious applications (with similar name/ features) on popular app-
stores and the Web and respond accordingly to bring them down.
controls.implementation_method: Implement operational procedure to institute a mechanism to actively monitor for the non-genuine/ unauthorised/ malicious applications (with similar name/ features) on popular app- stor

controls.control_objective: To ensure have adequate checks and balances to ensure that no transaction is carried out through non-genuine/ unauthorised digital payment products/ application
controls.control_description:
The server at the RE's end should have adequate checks and balances to ensure
that no transaction is carried out through non-genuine/ unauthorised digital payment
products/ applications and the authentication process is robust, secure and
centralised.
controls.implementation_method: Implement operational procedure to have adequate checks and balances to ensure that no transaction is carried out through non-genuine/ unauthorised digital payment products/ application

controls.control_objective: To ensure focus on how these applications handle, store and protect payment data
controls.control_description:
The security controls for digital payment applications must focus on how these
applications handle, store and protect payment data.
controls.implementation_method: Implement operational procedure to focus on how these applications handle, store and protect payment data

controls.control_objective: To ensure refer to standards such as owasp-masvs, owasp-asvs and other relevant owasp standards, security and data protection guidelines in iso 12812, threat ca
controls.control_description:
REs shall refer to standards such as OWASP-MASVS, OWASP-ASVS
and other relevant OWASP standards, security and data protection guidelines in
ISO 12812, threat catalogues and guides developed by NIST (including for
Bluetooth and LTE security), for application security and other protection measures.
controls.implementation_method: Establish and maintain policy to refer to standards such as owasp-masvs, owasp-asvs and other relevant owasp standards, security and data protection guidelines in iso 12812, threat ca

controls.control_objective: To ensure redact/ mask customer information such as account numbers/ card numbers/ other sensitive information when transmitted via sms/ e-mails
controls.control_description:
REs shall redact/ mask customer information such as account numbers/ card
numbers/ other sensitive information when transmitted via SMS/ e-mails.
controls.implementation_method: Implement operational procedure to redact/ mask customer information such as account numbers/ card numbers/ other sensitive information when transmitted via sms/ e-mails

controls.control_objective: To ensure implement
controls.control_description:
In view of the proliferation of cyber-attacks and their potential consequences, REs
should implement, except where explicitly permitted/ relaxed, multi-factor
authentication for payments through electronic modes and fund transfers, including
cash withdrawals from ATMs/ micro-ATMs/ business correspondents, through
digital payment applications.
controls.implementation_method: Implement operational procedure to implement

controls.control_objective: To ensure be generally dynamic or non-replicable
controls.control_description:
At least one of the authentication methodologies
should be generally dynamic or non-replicable.
controls.implementation_method: Implement operational procedure to be generally dynamic or non-replicable

controls.control_objective: To ensure also adopt adaptive authentication to select the right authentication factors depending on risk assessment, user risk profile and behaviour
controls.control_description:
REs may also adopt adaptive authentication to select the right authentication factors
depending on risk assessment, user risk profile and behaviour.
controls.implementation_method: Implement operational procedure to also adopt adaptive authentication to select the right authentication factors depending on risk assessment, user risk profile and behaviour

controls.control_objective: To ensure be based on an assessment of the risk posed by the re's digital payment products and services
controls.control_description:
In this regard,
a) The implementation of appropriate authentication methodologies should be
based on an assessment of the risk posed by the RE's digital payment products and services.
controls.implementation_method: Implement operational procedure to be based on an assessment of the risk posed by the re's digital payment products and services

controls.control_objective: To ensure be evaluated in light of the type of customer (e
controls.control_description: The risk should be evaluated in light of the type of customer (e.g., retail/ corporate/ commercial);
controls.implementation_method: Implement operational procedure to be evaluated in light of the type of customer (e

controls.control_objective: To ensure take into consideration customer acceptance, ease of use, reliable performance, scalability to accommodate growth, customer profile, location, transac
controls.control_description: An effective authentication method should take into consideration customer acceptance, ease of use, reliable performance, scalability to accommodate growth, customer profile, location, transaction, etc., and interoperability with other systems.
controls.implementation_method: Implement operational procedure to take into consideration customer acceptance, ease of use, reliable performance, scalability to accommodate growth, customer profile, location, transac

controls.control_objective: To ensure be applied in respect of all payment transactions (including debits and credits), creation of new account linkages (addition/ modification/ deletion o
controls.control_description:
c) To enhance online processing security, multi factor authentication and alerts
(like SMS, e-mail, etc.) should be applied in respect of all payment transactions (including debits and credits), creation of new account linkages (addition/ modification/ deletion of beneficiaries), changing account details or revision to fund transfer limits.
controls.implementation_method: Implement operational procedure to be applied in respect of all payment transactions (including debits and credits), creation of new account linkages (addition/ modification/ deletion o

controls.control_objective: To ensure take into account their efficacy and differing customer preferences for additional online protection
controls.control_description: In devising these security features, REs should take into account their efficacy and differing customer preferences for additional online protection.
controls.implementation_method: Implement operational procedure to take into account their efficacy and differing customer preferences for additional online protection

controls.control_objective: To ensure identify the merchant name
controls.control_description:
d) The alerts and OTPs received by the customer for online transactions shall
identify the merchant name, wherever applicable, rather than the payment aggregator through which the transaction was effected.
controls.implementation_method: Implement operational procedure to identify the merchant name

controls.control_objective: To ensure also implement appropriate measures to minimise exposure to a middleman attack which is more commonly known as a man-in-the-middle attack (mitm), man-
controls.control_description:
e) As an integral part of the multi factor authentication architecture, REs should
also implement appropriate measures to minimise exposure to a middleman attack which is more commonly known as a man-in-the-middle attack (MITM), man-in-the browser (MITB) attack or man-in-the application attack.
controls.implementation_method: Implement operational procedure to also implement appropriate measures to minimise exposure to a middleman attack which is more commonly known as a man-in-the-middle attack (mitm), man-

controls.control_objective: To ensure remain intact throughout the interaction with the customer
controls.control_description: f) An authenticated session, together with its encryption protocol, should remain intact throughout the interaction with the customer.

controls.control_description: Else, in the event of interference or in case the customer closes the application, the session should be terminated, and the affected transactions resolved or reversed out.

The customer shall be notified for failed log-in or authentication

The REs shall document and implement the configuration aspects for identifying

controls.control_objective: To ensure be parameterised and monitored in terms of various applicable parameters
controls.control_description:
System alerts shall be parameterised and monitored in terms of various applicable
parameters.
controls.implementation_method: Implement operational procedure to be parameterised and monitored in terms of various applicable parameters

controls.control_objective: To ensure zones/ rogue ips), behavioural biometrics, transaction origination from point of compromise, transactions to mobile wallets/ mobile numbers/ vpas on w
controls.control_description:
Such parameters, as applicable could be: transaction velocity (e.g.,
fund transfers, cash withdrawals, payments through electronic modes, adding new
beneficiaries, etc.) in a short period, more so in the accounts of customers who've
never used mobile app/ internet banking/ card ever (depending upon the type of
payment channel), high risk merchant category codes (MCC) parameters,
counterfeit card parameters (String of Invalid CVV/ PINs indicates an account
generation attack), new account parameters (excessive activity on a new account),
time zones, geo-locations, IP address origin (in respect of unusual patterns,
prohibited zones/ rogue IPs), behavioural biometrics, transaction origination from
point of compromise, transactions to mobile wallets/ mobile numbers/ VPAs on
whom vishing fraud or other types of fraud is/are registered/ recorded, declined
transactions, transactions with no approval code, etc.
controls.implementation_method: Implement operational procedure to zones/ rogue ips), behavioural biometrics, transaction origination from point of compromise, transactions to mobile wallets/ mobile numbers/ vpas on w

controls.control_description:

determine mechanism to prevent such frauds.

controls.control_objective: To ensure be educated about frauds and trained in the following skills and areas of expertise: a) fraud control tools and their usage

controls.control_description:

settlement file(s)) reconciliation framework for all digital payment transactions

business correspondents, card networks, payment system processors, payment
aggregators, payment gateways, third party technology service providers, other
participants, etc., shall be put in place for better detection and prevention of
suspicious transactions.

They shall also make
it mandatory (i.e.

controls.control_description:

controls.control_description:

risk appetite of the RE shall be put in place as per the Board-approved policy.
controls.implementation_method: Establish and maintain policy to be put in place as per the board-approved policy

controls.control_objective: To ensure institute a mechanism to monitor breaches
controls.control_description:
REs
shall institute a mechanism to monitor breaches, if any, on a 24x7 basis, including
weekends, long holidays and put in place a robust incident response mechanism to
mitigate the fraud loss, on account of suspicious transactions, if any.
controls.implementation_method: Implement operational procedure to institute a mechanism to monitor breaches

controls.control_objective: To ensure ensure that card details of the customers are not stored in plain text at the re and its vendor(s) locations, systems and applications
controls.control_description:
REs shall
ensure that card details of the customers are not stored in plain text at the RE and
its vendor(s) locations, systems and applications.
controls.implementation_method: Implement operational procedure to ensure that card details of the customers are not stored in plain text at the re and its vendor(s) locations, systems and applications

controls.control_objective: To ensure also ensure that the processing of card details in readable format is performed in a secure manner to strictly avoid data leakage of sensitive custome
controls.control_description:
REs shall also ensure that the
processing of card details in readable format is performed in a secure manner to
strictly avoid data leakage of sensitive customer information.
controls.implementation_method: Implement operational procedure to also ensure that the processing of card details in readable format is performed in a secure manner to strictly avoid data leakage of sensitive custome

controls.control_objective: To ensure adhere to the following safety measures: a) any tool (procured by/ from a third-party) for the purpose of scanning of unencrypted card data should fir
controls.control_description:
REs that use card data scanning tools to identify unencrypted (clear text) payments
card data in their ecosystem especially during audits shall adhere to the following
safety measures:
a) Any tool (procured by/ from a third-party) for the purpose of scanning of
unencrypted card data should first be tested in a test environment to understand the scope and impact of the tool's capabilities;
controls.implementation_method: Implement operational procedure to adhere to the following safety measures: a) any tool (procured by/ from a third-party) for the purpose of scanning of unencrypted card data should fir

controls.control_objective: To ensure be installed only in the re's premises on their devices
controls.control_description: b) The scanning tool should be installed only in the RE's premises on their devices;
controls.implementation_method: Implement operational procedure to be installed only in the re's premises on their devices

controls.control_objective: To ensure be done remotely
controls.control_description: c) Card data scanning should not be done remotely;
controls.implementation_method: Implement operational procedure to be done remotely

controls.control_objective: To ensure preferably reside in the scanning tool
controls.control_description: d) The discovered data, if any, must preferably reside in the scanning tool.
controls.implementation_method: Implement operational procedure to preferably reside in the scanning tool

controls.control_objective: To ensure be appropriately masked
controls.control_description: Exportable card data must be appropriately masked.
controls.implementation_method: Implement operational procedure to be appropriately masked

controls.control_objective: To ensure be taken out of the re's premises/ infrastructure)
controls.control_description: (No data, even masked, must be taken out of the RE's premises/ infrastructure);
controls.implementation_method: Implement operational procedure to be taken out of the re's premises/ infrastructure)

controls.control_objective: To ensure be provided only on the re's devices
controls.control_description:
and e) Limited access to service providers to conduct the scan or analyse the data, if
at all, must be provided only on the RE's devices.
controls.implementation_method: Implement operational procedure to be provided only on the re's devices
